narrative:
Liberty Twp 10 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,165 registered voters, with 63.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.3%, a modest Republican lean of 3.8 percentage points.
